---
title: " "
knit: (function(input_file, encoding) {
  out_dir <- 'docs';
  rmarkdown::render(input_file,
 encoding=encoding,
 output_file=file.path(dirname(input_file), out_dir, 'AboutMe.html'))})
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    css: "style.css"
---

<center> <h1>About me</h1> </center>

<div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

<center>
In my spare time, I run, together with other graduate students, [Community Based Project Evaluation (CBPE) group](www.cbpegroup.com), a graduate student organization that has been providing voluntary statistical evaluation of programs administered by local nonprofits for over two years. Additionally, when I am not doing research, I teach dance.
 
<center>

</div>
<div style="margin-bottom:20px;">
</div>

<hr style="border:0.5px solid gray">

<center>
I have put together [resources here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1aoryUTNnxxi_7e1q-mqYrkwfWZHiEQYqLbNbwZR1AAg/) on ways to help Ukrainian civilians if you are in the US.
<center>
